title: Benchmark Suite Schema
description: Strict JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) for defining a Benchmark Suite in Metadata Forge.

libraries.description: List of library coordinates included in this suite.

items.description: Dependency coordinate in the form group:artifact:version.

strategy.description: Reference to a strategy name defined elsewhere.

examples.name: core-libs-baseline
examples.description: Benchmark suite for core libraries using baseline strategy.
